description: Lock eyeglass_prescription_practices to Renaissance spectacle fitting and ordering practices, not an unsourced medieval or modern clinical prescription claim.

checks.reason: The node is anchored to the 13 June 1466 Milan order for Florence-made spectacles in age- and power-graded categories.
Spectacles are the object being fitted and ordered, not merely context.
Graded fitting practices depend on a trade capable of supplying lenses in varied powers.
